retry_reason: mdiobus_free is a put that always executes and cannot be retried; attempting to call it again would cause a double-put on a freed object.
contract_summary: Put wrapper for axienet MDIO bus teardown: unregisters the MDIO bus from the system, releases the bus reference via mdiobus_free, and sets the bus pointer to NULL. After this call, the caller must not dereference lp->mii_bus. The function represents the final release step in the mii_bus lifecycle; no further operations on the bus are permitted.
